content.scenarioHint: 你和朋友在校园里偶遇，想自然地打招呼并邀请对方参加你这周末的派对。请先用一句轻松的问候开启对话，然后顺势发出邀请。
expectedAnswers: Hey! What's up this weekend? I'm throwing a little party on Saturday—want to come?
Hi! Any plans for the weekend? I'm hosting a small get-together and would love for you to join!
What are you up to this weekend? There's a party at my place—definitely worth checking out!
Hey there! How's it going? I'm having a chill party Saturday night—should be fun, you in?
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否成功用问候开启对话并自然引出派对邀请
语言准确性：语法正确，时态和用词恰当
表达自然度：符合朋友间轻松随意的口语风格
关键词覆盖：使用了 'weekend', 'party', 'come/join/in' 等场景关键词

content.scenarioHint: 你和朋友闲聊时想自然地询问对方周末计划，并顺势邀请他参加你周六晚上的小型派对。
expectedAnswers: Hey, what are you up to this weekend? I'm having a little party Saturday night — you should come!
Any plans for Saturday? I'm throwing a small get-together, would you like to join?
What's your weekend looking like? I'm hosting a chill party Saturday — wanna stop by?
I'm thinking of having a small party this Saturday night. You free? Would be great if you could make it!
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否成功引出派对邀请并询问对方参与意愿
语言准确性：语法结构正确，时态使用恰当
表达自然度：符合朋友间轻松口语交流习惯
关键词覆盖：包含 'party', 'Saturday night', 'come/join' 等核心词汇

content.speakerText: Hey, I'm having a little get-together next Friday — you in?
content.speakerTextCn: 嘿，我下周五有个小型聚会，你来吗？
expectedAnswers: Definitely! I love these kinds of things!
Hmm, maybe — I’ll text you tomorrow to confirm.
Sounds fun! I’m free after 7 PM.
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否清晰回应邀请（接受/犹豫/有条件接受）
语言准确性：使用恰当的口语表达（e.g., you in?, get-together）
表达自然度：语气符合朋友间随意但真诚的互动风格
